goal: Compare learning rate schedules: constant vs cosine annealing vs linear warmup+decay for fine-tuning DistilBERT on SST-2 sentiment classification. Use 2000 samples, 3 epochs, seeds 42, 123, 456. Report accuracy with statistical comparison.
direction: Compare learning rate schedules: constant vs cosine annealing vs linear warmup+decay for fine-tuning DistilBERT on SST-2 sentiment classification. Use 2000 samples, 3 epochs, seeds 42, 123, 456. Report accuracy with statistical comparison.
